title: Helios — N-Body Studio
description: A real-time gravitational N-body studio: Barnes-Hut O(n log n) solver, five integrators, inelastic collisions & accretion, a shadow-copy orbit forecaster, a click-to-inspect body probe, eleven astrophysical presets (incl. the figure-eight choreography, the Pythagorean three-body problem, Saturn's rings and Jupiter's Trojans), live energy diagnostics, colour-by speed/mass/acceleration, and shareable permalinks — all hand-written TypeScript on a Canvas.
